caption: The video appears to be captured by a security camera, labeled "Cam 04," and shows a nighttime scene under a covered area with a corrugated metal roof. The timestamp indicates it is late at night on May 13, 2022. In the first frame, a person is seen walking away from the camera towards the left side of the frame, carrying what looks like a white object. The environment includes various items such as a ladder, some tools, and possibly construction materials scattered around. In the second frame, the person has moved further to the left, almost out of view, still holding the white object. The lighting is dim, primarily coming from a single light source on the right side, casting shadows and creating a somewhat eerie atmosphere. The overall setting suggests an outdoor workspace or storage area.
